topic: Your Brain Burns 20% of Your Daily Calories

script.hook: Your brain weighs 2% of your body — but burns 20% of your calories.
script.tension: That tiny organ is the hungriest part of your entire body.
script.explanation: Your brain runs on glucose — about 120 grams per day. It powers 86 billion neurons firing nonstop, even while you sleep. Hard thinking doesn't burn significantly more — your brain is always running at max capacity, just redirecting resources.
script.punchline: Your biggest calorie burner isn't your muscles. It's between your ears. Follow for more.

scenes.visual_description: HOOK — Athletic person exhausted after intense workout, then dramatic transition to brain concept
scenes.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a fit athletic man in his late 20s sitting on a gym bench catching his breath after a hard workout, sweat dripping, then he touches his temple with one finger as if having a realization, dramatic warm amber and orange gym lighting, shallow depth of field. Subject centered in frame, all action in the center third of the image, close-up shot, nothing important on left or right edges. No CGI, no animation, no 3D render, photorealistic only. Natural human anatomy, correct number of fingers, realistic body proportions. 4K cinematic.

scenes.prompt: Cinematic overhead shot of a dark table with a precisely measured pile of white sugar on a small kitchen scale showing 120 grams, surrounded by brain-fuel foods like bananas and orange juice, dramatic moody top-down lighting with warm golden tones, shallow depth of field. Subject centered in frame, all action in the center third of the image, close-up shot, nothing important on left or right edges. No CGI, no animation, no 3D render, photorealistic only. Natural human anatomy, correct number of fingers, realistic body proportions. 4K cinematic.

scenes.prompt: Cinematic medium shot of a fit athletic man peacefully sleeping in a dark bedroom, subtle blue moonlight on his face, a soft warm glow emanating around his head suggesting intense brain activity even at rest, serene but powerful atmosphere. Subject centered in frame, all action in the center third of the image, medium shot, nothing important on left or right edges. No CGI, no animation, no 3D render, photorealistic only. scenes.prompt: Cinematic medium close-up of a confident fit athletic man in a dark gym pointing to his temple with a knowing smirk, looking directly at camera, dramatic red and orange rim lighting behind him, powerful motivational energy, dark contrasty background. youtube.title: Your Brain Burns More Calories Than You Think 🧠
youtube.description:
Your body is smarter than you think.

Your brain makes up just 2% of your body weight but consumes 20% of your daily calories. It burns through 120 grams of glucose every day, powering 86 billion neurons that never stop firing — even while you sleep. Hard thinking doesn't burn more — your brain is always at max capacity.

Follow @YourBodyExplainedHQ for daily science-backed fitness facts.

#shorts #fitness #brain #calories #science #health #nutrition #neuroscience #fyp
